shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Areas Of Fog
name: Today
detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain before noon, then areas of fog and a chance of rain between noon and 4pm, then rain likely and areas of fog. Cloudy, with a high near 38. Northeast wind around 8 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
